uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the profile was created.

Habit.title: Habit
Habit.description: Defines a habit to be tracked.

id.description: The unique ID of the habit.

uid.description: The ID of the user who owns this habit.

color.description: The color associated with the habit.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the habit was created.

deleted.description: Whether the habit is marked as deleted.

DailyEntry.title: Daily Entry
DailyEntry.description: Stores the checklist data for a specific day.

id.description: The unique ID of the entry (usually YYYY-MM-DD_uid).

uid.description: The ID of the user who owns this entry.

date.description: The date of the entry in YYYY-MM-DD format.

habits.description: A map of habit IDs to completion status (boolean).

isDayCompleted.description: Whether the day's tasks are marked as completed.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the entry was created/updated.
